description.value:
You gather organic plant or fungal matter to your body, permanently increasing your size. You become Large.

Once per day as a two-action activity with the concentrate trait, you can grow a burst of foliage that further reinforces your body, increasing your reach by 5 feet, granting you a +2 status bonus to melee damage rolls, and making you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Agglomerate Leshy]
